stories.title: The MLB draft is Saturday! Kiley McDaniel predicts...
stories.summary: Who goes No. 1 to the White Sox? This year, the intrigue begins with a trio of stars in play for the top pick.

stories.title: The players we can't wait to see in the MLB Future...
stories.summary: The brightest stars in the minors take the field Sunday in Philly. Here's who we'll be watching most closely.

stories.title: No GPS tracker for Arnold, can work out for teams
stories.summary: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold does not need to wear a GPS tracker as a condition of his release, a Florida judge ruled Friday, allowing him to continue to work out with NFL teams in an effort to get re-signed after being cut.

stories.title: Sinner beats Djokovic, returns to Wimbledon final
stories.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner will play for his second consecutive Wimbledon title after defeating seven-time champion Novak Djokovic 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 in the semifinals Friday.

stories.title: Scheffler headed for first missed cut in 4 years
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler was making plans for an early arrival to Royal Birkdale after he stumbled through a round of 2-over 72 on Friday at the Scottish Open and seemed certain to miss the cut for the first time in nearly four years.
